category_sources: source_facts.description says parser generator; current_curation.category_path lists developer-tools.
display_name_sources: Official GNU page is titled GNU Bison; source_facts.name is bison.
docs_sources: Official GNU Bison page links Documentation for Bison; official manual page provides GNU Bison manual formats.
repo_sources: Official GNU Bison page directs development sources to the Savannah project; official mirror metadata identifies the Savannah Git repository as git.savannah.gnu.org/git/bison.git.
tags_sources: source_facts.description and official GNU page describe Bison as a general-purpose parser generator compatible with Yacc.
